{"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-54784", "cvss": {"score": 7.4, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.4, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-311", "name": "Missing Encryption of Sensitive Data"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-523", "name": "Unprotected Transport of Credentials"}], "description": "### Impact
When the proof key recovered from the RSTR can be observed by a party that is not the legitimate client, that party can impersonate the authenticated Windows principal for the lifetime of the SCT (default ~10 hours) and decrypt or forge any subsequent WS‑SecureConversation traffic that uses keys derived from the SCT.

#### Preconditions
Using security mode TransportWithMessageCredential with client credential type Windows, along with session establishment (which triggers use of WS-SecureConversation).

### Patches
Fixed in CoreWCF v1.9.1

### Workarounds
Ensure communication is protected by SSL/TLS to prevent capturing of SCT negotiation handshake.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00175, "percentile": 0.07145}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-2288-8h3r-cqgg", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-19T20:47:17Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-2288-8h3r-cqgg", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-2288-8h3r-cqgg"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-54784"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-19T20:47:17Z", "references": ["https://github.com/CoreWCF/CoreWCF/security/advisories/GHSA-2288-8h3r-cqgg", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-2288-8h3r-cqgg"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/CoreWCF/CoreWCF/security-advisories/GHSA-2288-8h3r-cqgg", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/CoreWCF/CoreWCF", "summary": "CoreWCF: SPNEGO SecurityContextToken proof key wrapped without confidentiality", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-19T20:47:18Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-2288-8h3r-cqgg", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.9.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "nuget", "name": "CoreWCF.Primitives"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 1.9.0, < 1.9.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: CoreWCF: SPNEGO SecurityContextToken proof key wrapped without confidentiality
